title: Job Opening Category Manager at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
